evals.prompt: I'm running out of disk space on my development machine. Help me find and clean up storage.
evals.expected_output: Run investigation commands (df -h, du), identify storage consumers, present findings with explanations, ask user what to clean before executing

evals.prompt: My Mac is showing 5GB free and running slow. I'm a developer with Xcode, Docker, and various projects.
evals.expected_output: Detect macOS, check iOS Simulators, Docker, ~/Library/Caches, present options with sizes, explain what each is before cleaning

evals.prompt: Linux server is running low on space. I need to clean up safely - it has Docker and some Python projects.
evals.expected_output: Detect Linux, check /var/log, Docker system df, package manager cache, ~/.cache, present findings and ask confirmation before cleaning

evals.prompt: Can I safely delete the Docker images on my machine? I haven't used Docker in months.
evals.expected_output: Run docker system df to show usage, list images with sizes, explain which are safe to remove, confirm with user before running prune

evals.prompt: What's using all my disk space? I have npm, pip, go, and cargo installed.
evals.expected_output: Check all developer caches (~/.npm, ~/.cache/pip, ~/go/pkg/mod, ~/.cargo), show sizes, explain each and whether safe to clean
